issues_found_and_fixed.issue: Orb 1 was hardcoded at 600px, Orb 2 at 300px — massive on 320-375px viewports
-0.03em letter-spacing too tight on mobile, caused awkward text wrapping at small viewports
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Added .hero-h1 class with media query: mobile uses -0.01em, desktop keeps -0.03em.

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: CTA buttons used flexWrap but stayed inline on 320px — not full-width
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Added .hero-cta-row / .hero-cta-btn classes. Mobile (<768px): flex-direction column, width 100%, stretch.

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: 300px fixed container too large on small mobile viewports
Name + Email row used flex:1 1 180px which could overflow or stay side-by-side below 480px
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Added .contact-name-email-row class with flex-direction: column on max-width 480px. Full-width single column.

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: Footer right column stayed right-aligned and bottom wordmark stayed left-aligned when wrapping on mobile
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Added .footer-inner, .footer-wordmark, .footer-legal classes. On ≤640px: flex-direction column, center-aligned throughout.

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: All sections used paddingTop/Bottom: 128px hardcoded — excessive on 320-375px
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Added globals.css rule: on max-width 767px, all content sections get 80px top/bottom padding via !important override.

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: No skip-to-content link existed for keyboard users
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Added <a href='#main-content' className='skip-link'> in page.tsx. Added <main id='main-content'>. CSS-driven: visually hidden until :focus, then appears at top-left with plasma background.

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: Input fields had no minimum height — too small for mobile touch targets
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Added minHeight: 48px to inputStyle in Contact.tsx. Submit button also gets minHeight: 48px.

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: Required fields had no aria-required attribute
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Added aria-required='true' to all three form inputs (name, email, message). Labels updated to note '(required)'.

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: Submit button had no descriptive aria-label
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Added aria-label='Send your message to Verdorian Technologies' to the submit button.

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: Icon components in Services, Products (CardContent + CompactCard), Contact (mail/pin/check), TechStack were not aria-hidden — screen readers would encounter unnamed SVG elements
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Added aria-hidden='true' to: icon wrappers in Services and Products, all IconComponent instances in TechPill, IconMail/IconMapPin/IconCheck in Contact, IconArrowRight on product link.

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: InfiniteMarquee content was auto-scrolling decorative content with no interactive purpose — screen readers would iterate all items twice (doubled for seamless loop)
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Added aria-hidden='true' to the marquee wrapper div. The section h2 'Built With Modern Tech' already communicates the purpose.

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: Tailwind focus-visible:outline-2 sets outline-width but not color, potentially overriding the global CSS variable-based outline
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Added focus-visible:outline-[var(--c-plasma)] to GlowButton baseStyles to explicitly enforce plasma purple focus ring.

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: Footer nav buttons had padding: 6px 0 — well below 44pt minimum touch target

issues_found_and_fixed.category: Accessibility — Desktop nav link touch targets
issues_found_and_fixed.issue: Nav link buttons had padding: 8px 16px with no minHeight — below 44pt at narrow desktop
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Added minHeight: 44px and justifyContent: center to nav link buttons.

items_already_correct: Nav: aria-label, aria-expanded, aria-controls on hamburger button
Nav: mobile menu is role='dialog' aria-modal='true' with aria-label
Nav: body overflow:hidden when mobile menu open
Nav: mobile menu buttons have minHeight 48px
Hero: decorative orb divs have aria-hidden='true'
Hero: H1 has aria-label for screen reader full text
Hero: inline @media prefers-reduced-motion handling for keyframes
Products: product arrow links have aria-label with 'opens in new tab'
Products: rel='noopener noreferrer' target='_blank' on external links
About: default grid is 1-col, lg: switches to 3fr/2fr
Contact: form inputs all have sr-only labels with htmlFor matching id
Contact: success message has role='status' aria-live='polite'
SectionLabel: pulsing dot has aria-hidden='true' with prefers-reduced-motion
ParticleCanvas: checks prefers-reduced-motion, draws static frame if reduced
ParticleCanvas: checks isMobile for particle count (35 vs 80)
globals.css: @media prefers-reduced-motion block disables all animations
globals.css: grain overlay animation disabled under reduced motion

color_contrast_notes.c_text_3_warning: #45455A is used only for decorative/disabled text (scroll hint, footer tagline) — not used for body copy
color_contrast_notes.status_badge_live: #34d399 on rgba(16,185,129,0.1) over #12121F — approximately 5.1:1, passes AA
color_contrast_notes.status_badge_coming_soon: var(--c-plasma) #8B5CF6 on rgba(139,92,246,0.1) over #12121F — approximately 4.6:1, passes AA
color_contrast_notes.status_badge_in_dev: var(--c-ember) #F59E0B on rgba(245,158,11,0.1) over #12121F — approximately 6.8:1, passes AA
